prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档 断档记录；抖音综合热度未进入全国前100名，关注度一般；电气工程A、动力工程及工程热物理A-，均为电力行业核心学科，与招生专业高度匹配，对高分考生 有较强吸引力；211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属全国中上游水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化2024年评为"高热推荐"，电子信息/通信、计算机类持续高热，与该校王牌专业方向契合；本省2026年物理类考生约2 0.4万人（按历史比例估算），较2025年19.2万人增加约6.1%，竞争加剧；学校位于北京市，对福建考生有较强跨省吸引力；该 校在福建招生规模较大（物理类90人），属外省在京高校中招生较多的院校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类大幅扩招（+15.4%）缓解竞争、本省物理类考生增加（+6.1%） 加剧竞争、电气等王牌专业热度持续吸引高分考生等因素，扩招效应略大于考生增量效应，预计最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约15967名，区间15467–16467名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8913 → 10822 → 9647 → 14088 → 14800, showing a clear downward trend overall, with a cumulative decline of about 5100 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 14800 places; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 75 in 2021, 74 in 2022, 73 in 2023, 73 in 2024, and 78 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 90, an increase of 12 students (+15.4%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps; its comprehensive popularity on Douyin has not entered the national top 100, with average attention; Electrical Engineering is rated A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, both core disciplines in the electric power industry, highly matching the enrollment majors and strongly attractive to high-scoring students; it is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 84th in 2026, with a stable range of 75–84 in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024, while Electronic Information/Communication and Computer Science majors remain highly popular, aligning with the school's flagship disciplines; the province's Physics Category examinees in 2026 are estimated at about 204,000 (based on historical proportions), an increase of about 6.1% from 192,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the school is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Fujian students; the school has a relatively large enrollment scale in Fujian (90 in Physics Category), making it one of the higher-enrollment institutions among out-of-province universities in Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion in Physics Category in 2026 (+15.4%) easing competition, the increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (+6.1%) intensifying competition, and the sustained high popularity of flagship majors like Electrical Engineering attracting high-scoring students, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the examinee increase effect, so the minimum ranking is expected to decline slightly compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 15967, with a range of 15467–16467.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年历史类招生 计划持平、本省历史类考生增加（+6.3%）导致竞争加剧、法学等专业热度偏高等因素，预计最低位次较2025年小幅前移；预测最低位次约2753名，区间2257–3249名。

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; the university's reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin attention is average; Electrical Engineering is rated A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, although these are science and engineering disciplines, they enhance the overall reputation; History Category majors mainly include literature, law, economics, and management, with low correlation to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular (recommended), Network and New Media has average popularity, foreign language majors have average popularity and are cautious; the number of History Category examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 64,000 (estimated by historical proportion), an increase of about 6.3% compared to 60,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Fujian History Category examinees; the History Category enrollment plan is only 7, a small scale, making ranking fluctuations more sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the unchanged 2026 History Category enrollment plan, increased competition due to a 6.3% rise in provincial History Category examinees, and high popularity of majors like Law, the minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2753, with a range of 2257–3249.
